description: Pack of three body-sprays Straight from reebok's Sports lifestyle collection of deodorants comes this fabulous toiletry. It's an amazing fragrant sensation perfect for women. The deodorants come in cylindrical bottles.Quantity: 75 ml eachCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
